commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=a0de1d277d4fa989bb9fa71fd92570c022157607)
commands.review_summary:
The branch routes core doctor lint checks through ordered doctor health contributions, adds `healthChecks`-based contribution plumbing, limits the broad repair pass to non-core checks, updates tests/docs, and removes the conversion-plan ledger.

PR surface: Source -139, Tests +116, Docs +2. Total -21 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: a `healthChecks`-only contribution calls `runDoctorHealthRepairs` and then ignores `result.findings`, so detect-only findings have no normal doctor output. I did not execute the CLI because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Human follow-up is needed because the PR has a protected maintainer label, a code-level review finding, and missing contributor real behavior proof that automation cannot supply for the contributor.

target.title: Keep core doctor health in contribution order
target.author: giodl73-repo

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
